_meta.placeholder: Probe text contains the literal token {name}. Render it as the subject's first name (e.g. "Has {name} ever…" → "Has Sarah ever…"). Never show the raw token to players.
_meta.consent: No per-probe flags or content toggles. The go-deeper vote is the group consent mechanism (tiers 2+3 play as Spicy, 4+5 as Deep — see DESIGN.md); subjects always retain the invisible burn.
_meta.quality_bar: High population entropy x high individual inferability; both answers ownable; verifiable in 5 seconds (timeframes/thresholds); the predictor's explanation must be juicier than the answer. Negative-valence relational probes are roast-energy (being named is a badge), not rejection-energy (naming a third party who never consented).
_meta.license_note: All questions are original text written for Black Box. Inspired by the energy of Askhole (CC BY-NC-SA) but no Askhole text is reproduced or adapted. If you later import actual Askhole cards, those cards carry BY-NC-SA terms.

probes.text: Did {name} make their bed this morning?
Is {name}'s phone on silent right now?
{name}'s phone battery, right now?
Over/under 6 hours: {name}'s screen time yesterday? (They check. You watch.)
Over/under 1,000: unread emails in {name}'s inbox right now?
Over/under 40: browser tabs currently open on {name}'s laptop?
Has {name} ever pretended to have read a book to impress someone?
Did {name} cry at a movie or show in the last year?
Has {name} googled themselves this month?
Does {name} sing out loud when they're alone?
Has {name} eaten something off the floor this week?
Has {name} ever walked out of a movie?
Does {name} have a skincare routine of three or more steps?
Has {name} ever lied about having plans so they could stay home?
Does {name} reread their own texts after sending them?
Has {name} ever kept a New Year's resolution past March?
Has {name} ever clapped when a plane landed?
Does {name} know their own blood type?
Has {name} taken a nootropic other than caffeine?
Over/under 10: books {name} started this year and didn't finish?
Has {name} ghosted a group chat for over a month?
Has {name} fake-laughed at a joke tonight?
Does {name} talk to themselves out loud when alone?
Has {name} ever stolen a traffic cone or street sign?

Over/under 30 minutes: how long {name} took to get ready tonight?

Would {name} rather be respected or liked?
Would {name} rather be feared or pitied?
Does {name} believe in any form of afterlife — even a weird one?
Would {name} take a pill that permanently removed their need for others' approval?
Does {name} think they're more self-aware than the median person in this room?
Does {name} have a five-year plan they actually believe in?
Has {name} ever held a prediction-market position they'd be embarrassed to explain?
{name} learns they have one healthy year left. Do they keep working?
Does {name} think most people would like them more if they knew them better?
Would {name} rather be brilliant and unrecognized, or average and celebrated?
Has {name} ever had what they'd call a spiritual experience?
{name}'s deepest driver?
Would {name} press a button to learn the exact date of their death?
Does {name} think they could write a novel people would actually finish?
Has a single conversation ever changed {name}'s mind about something big?
Would {name} rather lose the ability to read, or the ability to speak?
Is {name} more afraid of wasting their life than of dying?
Has {name} ever seriously considered starting a commune, cult, or religion?
Does {name} think they're good at small talk?
When {name}'s gut and {name}'s spreadsheet disagree, does the gut usually win?
Does {name} keep a journal at least monthly?
Forced into one for a year, {name} picks?
Does {name} expect the table to read them right more often than not tonight?
Would {name} rather be able to read minds, or be impossible to read?
Does {name} believe in soulmates — even probabilistically?
Has {name} ever written fan fiction?
Does {name} think they'd outlast the median person here in an apocalypse?
Would {name} clone themselves, if it were safe and legal?
Has {name} used a psychedelic in the past year?
How satisfied is {name} with how this year is going, 1–10?
Has {name} cried about money in the last five years?
Does {name} currently envy someone at this event?
Does {name} check how a post is performing within ten minutes of posting it?
Does {name} feel behind their peers professionally?
Has {name} cried about AI risk?
Does {name} believe their IQ is higher than their best friend's?
Over/under 3: people {name} has loved who never found out?
Has {name} ever lied about their body count — in either direction?
How lonely has {name} felt this past year, 1–10?
Has {name} ever rehearsed a 'spontaneous' story before a party?
Is there a specific person whose follower count {name} checks?
More often than not, does {name} feel relief when social plans get canceled?
Has {name} googled an ex in the last month?
Does {name} currently have a crush they haven't acted on?
Has {name} ever cried in a workplace bathroom?

Is {name} currently waiting on a text from someone specific?

At this event, does {name} feel like an insider or an outsider?

{name}'s feared cost of getting what they want?
Has {name} ever deleted a post because it flopped?

Would {name} rather have their browser history or their group chats made public?
Has {name} ever kissed someone within 24 hours of meeting them?

Has {name} ugly-cried to a song in public?
Has {name} checked their net worth this week?
Does {name} know, within $100, how much money they have?
Has {name} ever lied to a therapist?
Has {name} pretended to understand a technical concept at this event?

Has {name} ever flirted to get something specific?
Has {name} ever said 'it's not you, it's me' when it was definitely them?
Has {name} ever imagined their own funeral — specifically who'd be crying?

Has {name} ever read a partner's messages without permission?

Does {name} have a secret that would change how people here see them? (No, they don't have to say what.)

Has {name} ever ended a friendship on purpose and let it look like drift?
Has {name} ever fantasized about a friend's partner?
Has {name} ever cried to get out of consequences?
Has {name} ever taken credit for an idea that wasn't theirs — and never corrected it?
Is there an apology {name} owes that they've decided never to give?
Has {name} ever said 'I love you' without meaning it?
Has {name} ever hoped a friend's relationship would fail?
Has {name} ever used someone's insecurity against them — on purpose?
Has {name} ever wished someone they love would simply disappear from their life?
Over/under 10: {name}'s lifetime body count?
Has {name} ever faked an orgasm?
Has {name} ever hooked up with someone at this event — any year?
Has {name} ever had sex somewhere they could have been arrested for it?
Has {name} ever ghosted someone after sleeping with them?
Has {name} ever spent over an hour, in one sitting, on an ex's new partner's profile?

Has {name} ever read someone's diary?
Has {name} ever dated someone mostly for their status or connections?
Has {name} ever pursued someone they knew was explicitly off-limits?
Has {name} ever had a friends-with-benefits arrangement destroy the friendship?
How honest has {name} been with you tonight, 1–10?
Who at this table would {name} trust with a real secret?
Who here is {name} most curious about?

What in {name}'s life is held together mostly by {name} pretending it's fine?
What did {name} almost say tonight, and didn't?

What's {name}'s actual guilty pleasure — the real one, not the rehearsed one?

What part of tonight will {name} replay on the walk home?
